settings.model.orchestratorDesc: Drives the main conversation and coordinates agents; configure connection credentials and new-session defaults here. Existing sessions can switch independently in the composer.
settings.model.auxiliaryDesc: For session-title refinement, knowledge extraction, and long-context compression (not used in the main conversation)
settings.model.urlMode.standardRecommend: This endpoint follows a standard-compatible shape. Prefer Standard mode unless you need the proxy path passed through exactly as entered.

settings.model.auxiliarySystemUsage: Powers learning extraction, session title refinement, session memory, and prompt enhancement (not used in the main conversation)
settings.model.noWorkerConfig: No dedicated role model is configured. The main model environment will be inherited by default.
settings.profile.userRulesDesc: Injected as system-level constraints into the main model and all agents
settings.profile.userRulesPlaceholder:
Example:
- Prefer strict TypeScript types
- Confirm dependencies before changes
- Output must include change summary
categoryDefinition.architecture.descript: Handles system architecture, module design, and interface boundaries.
categoryDefinition.backend.description: Handles API implementation, data storage, and server-side logic.
categoryDefinition.frontend.description: Handles pages, components, styling, and interaction implementation.
categoryDefinition.data_analysis.descrip: Handles data processing, metric analysis, reporting, and visualization.
categoryDefinition.devops.description: Handles release delivery, environment setup, CI/CD, and operational automation.
categoryDefinition.implement.description: Handles feature development, business logic implementation, and delivery.
categoryDefinition.refactor.description: Handles structural improvement, duplication removal, and maintainability upgrades.
categoryDefinition.bugfix.description: Handles defect fixes, error handling, and regression protection.
categoryDefinition.debug.description: Handles issue diagnosis, reproduction analysis, and log investigation.
categoryDefinition.test.description: Handles test design, automated verification, and coverage growth.
categoryDefinition.review.description: Handles quality review, risk identification, and standards checks.
categoryDefinition.document.description: Handles README, comments, API docs, and delivery notes.
categoryDefinition.integration.descripti: Handles cross-module wiring, contract alignment, and joint debugging.
categoryDefinition.simple.description: Handles small-scope changes, formatting updates, and lightweight fixes.
categoryDefinition.general.description: Handles uncategorized work through reasonable general execution.

stream.recovery.continuationPrompt:
[System] The previous output was interrupted during transmission (network fluctuation). Auto-recovery ({attempt}/{max}). Here is the last fragment before interruption:
"{tail}"
Please continue immediately after the fragment above without repeating any existing content.
stream.recovery.continuationPromptNoTail: [System] The previous output was interrupted during transmission (network fluctuation). Auto-recovery ({attempt}/{max}). Please continue from where the output left off without repeating.
stream.recovery.toolCallWithText: [System] The previous round was interrupted during tool call phase (network fluctuation). Auto-recovery ({attempt}/{max}). Please continue from existing output; if tools are needed, re-emit the complete tool_call with full arguments. Do not repeat prior text.
stream.recovery.toolCallOnly: [System] The previous round was interrupted during tool call phase (network fluctuation). Auto-recovery ({attempt}/{max}). Please continue the current task; if tools are still needed, re-emit the complete tool_call with full arguments.
